ddls:
CREATE TABLE "receipts" (
  "receipt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each receipt */,
  "receipt_date" TEXT /* Date the receipt was created */,
  "receipt_fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year the receipt belongs to */,
  "receipt_period" TEXT /* Period the receipt belongs to */,
  "receipt_document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the receipt document */,
  "supplier_account_id" TEXT /* Supplier account ID associated with the receipt */,
  "business_unit_code" TEXT /* Business unit code associated with the receipt */,
  "purchase_order_id" INTEGER /* Purchase order ID associated with the receipt */,
  "purchase_order_date" TEXT /* Date the purchase order was created */,
  "entered_by" TEXT /* User who entered the receipt */,
  "receipt_amount_local" REAL /* Amount of the receipt in local currency */,
  "receipt_local_currency" TEXT /* Local currency of the receipt */,
  "purchase_order_amount_local" REAL /* Amount of the purchase order in local currency */,
  "purchase_order_local_currency" TEXT /* Local currency of the purchase order */,
  "receipt_status" TEXT /* Status of the receipt */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the receipt was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the receipt was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the receipt */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the receipt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("receipt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_receipts_business_unit_code FOREIGN KEY ("business_unit_code") REFERENCES business_units ("business_unit_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_receipts_purchase_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_order_id") REFERENCES purchase_orders ("purchase_order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_receipts_supplier_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_account_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "supplier_address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  "credit_rating" TEXT /* Credit rating of the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supplier was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supplier's information was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who added the supplier */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the supplier's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_units" (
  "business_unit_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each business unit */,
  "business_unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the business unit */,
  "business_unit_address" TEXT /* Address of the business unit */,
  "manager_id" TEXT /* ID of the manager responsible for the business unit */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the business unit */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the business unit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the business unit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the business unit's information was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the business unit */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the business unit's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_unit_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_orders" (
  "purchase_order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase order */,
  "purchase_order_date" TEXT /* Date the purchase order was created */,
  "supplier_id" TEXT /* Supplier ID associated with the purchase order */,
  "business_unit_code" TEXT /* Business unit code associated with the purchase order */,
  "purchase_order_amount" REAL /* Amount of the purchase order */,
  "purchase_order_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the purchase order */,
  "purchase_order_status" TEXT /* Status of the purchase order */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the purchase order */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the purchase order was approved */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the purchase order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the purchase order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the purchase order was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the purchase order */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the purchase order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_business_unit_code FOREIGN KEY ("business_unit_code") REFERENCES business_units ("business_unit_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_rates" (
  "exchange_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate */,
  "from_currency" TEXT /* Currency to convert from */,
  "to_currency" TEXT /* Currency to convert to */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate value */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the exchange rate becomes effective */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the exchange rate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exchange rate was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exchange rate was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who added the exchange rate */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the exchange rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_rate_id")
)
